title: bursa bursa-pastoris
intro: Bursa bursa-pastoris, also known as common peppercress or land cress, is a small annual herb belonging to the Brassicaceae family, native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of bursa bursa-pastoris include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant support, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Bursa bursa-pastoris can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its effects.
